entries.speaker: World of Shadows
entries.text:
Two couples meet in a Paris apartment on behalf of their children. The incident happened in the schoolyard; what happens here will be settled in a salon.

You are Annette Reille. The apartment is yours, and with it the expectation that this will be handled with civility — the meeting was your idea.

The salon: four chairs arranged around a low table. Art books and tulips signal considered taste. A tray holds espresso cups no one has touched yet. Nobody has sat down.

scene_blocks.text: Two couples meet in a Paris apartment on behalf of their children. The incident happened in the schoolyard; what happens here will be settled in a salon.
You are Annette Reille. The apartment is yours, and with it the expectation that this will be handled with civility — the meeting was your idea.
The salon: four chairs arranged around a low table. Art books and tulips signal considered taste. A tray holds espresso cups no one has touched yet. Nobody has sat down.
You keep turning this into a legal question. It is not a legal question.
Alain glances at his phone but does not pick it up yet.

actual.raw_player_input:
IMPORTANT: Write ALL player-visible narrative in German. Do not switch to French unless quoting in-world French text explicitly marked as a quotation. Opening turn for module god_of_carnage. Establish the starting situation in scene phase_1 (phase_1). Scene description: n/a. Cast: unknown. Write vivid but grounded opening narration within canonical module boundaries. Set initial dramatic pressure, social posture, and opening narrative threads.

Session opening (canonical direction/opening_sequence.yaml; ADR-0035). Anchor: Paris apartment, evening — hosts and guests meet over the incident between their children. Deliver THREE narrator beats in order before any NPC speech: (1) narrator_intro — background/premise: the configured triggering incident and why these adults meet; (2) role_anchor — inner-perception narrator that places annette in the scene (who they are, their place in this room, their disposition at the start); (3) scene_setup — the Paris salon: physical space, ritual objects, social temperature. Use three narrator paragraphs (blank line between each) or three gm_narration strings. Prefer JSON field narration_summary as a list of exactly three strings, e.g. "narration_summary": ["narrator_intro: …", "role_anchor: …", "scene_setup: …"]. After all three beats, scene targets phase_1; keep NPC lines aligned with that phase. Opening knowledge contract goc_opening_sequence_v1 requires events ['event_01_triggering_incident', 'event_02_adult_consequence', 'event_03_arrival_threshold', 'event_04_apartment_as_stage', 'event_05_role_anchor', 'event_06_first_playable_moment'] and must_establish ['triggering_incident', 'adult_consequence', 'reason_for_meeting', 'apartment_as_social_stage', 'selected_player_role_presence', 'first_playable_moment']. Emit structured coverage evidence as "opening_event_ids" with the covered event ids; semantic rule hits, when present, must use "runtime_gate_detections" ids. Hard forbidden detection: reject_on=['forced_player_speech', 'npc_world_explanation', 'meta_runtime_language', 'source_text_reproduction', 'player_agency_violation'], recover_on=['abstract_theme_dump', 'stage_direction_labels', 'summary_only_opening']. Apply hard-forbidden rules by their authored ids; narrator owns spatial/premise establishment.
